content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Bluewater Financial
Customer ID: C003
Contract ID: K015
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Deal Type: Renewal + Expansion
Date: July 1, 2024

DEAL SUMMARY
Renewed Bluewater Financial and expanded from InsightIQ Starter (5 users) to Enterprise (25 users). No discount applied. New ARR: $36,000.

RENEWAL NOTES
The expansion was expected. Marcus Webb confirmed the pilot exceeded expectations and received sign-off from the Chief Risk Officer to roll out InsightIQ to the risk and portfolio management teams. The upgrade to Enterprise tier was driven by the user count increase and the need for Enterprise-level audit logging.

NEGOTIATION NOTES
No price negotiation. Bluewater's procurement process was smoother this time as the vendor relationship was already established. DPA amendment was processed in two days.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
Marcus Webb mentioned exploring InsightIQ for their compliance reporting team in 2025, which could add another 8-10 users. Flag for mid-2025 conversation.
